en_title: Obsession Breakout Star Inde Navarrette Goes Viral for Old Streams of the Last of Us, PlayStation Responds
cn_title: 《Obsession》女主Inde Navarrette旧日《最后生还者》直播视频爆火，PlayStation官方回应
subtitle: 游戏直播意外走红
opus_summary: 《Obsession》主演Inde Navarrette因早年游戏直播视频走红，PlayStation UK幽默回应。该片成本75万美元(约合人民币509万元)(约合537万元)，成好莱坞最成功电影之一。

paragraphs.en: Obsession breakout star, Inde Navarrette, is going viral for her gaming livestreams, including Sony hit The Last of Us.
paragraphs.cn: 《Obsession》的爆红主演Inde Navarrette因她的游戏直播视频而走红，其中包括索尼热门作品《最后生还者》。

paragraphs.en: Last month, a brand new horror movie known as Obsession was released, and it has been one of Hollywood's biggest success stories. The film was made for just $750,000 before being picked up by Focus Features for distribution. It has since gone on to , making it one of the most profitable movies ever made. The film also catapulted the careers of first-time director Curry Barker and star Inde Navarrette. The actress plays a young woman who becomes erratic after her friend wishes for her to fall in love with him.
paragraphs.cn: 上个月，一部名为《Obsession》的全新恐怖片上映，成为好莱坞最成功的电影之一。该片制作成本仅为75万美元(约合人民币537万元)，后被Focus Features收购发行。此后，它成为有史以来最赚钱的电影之一。这部电影也一举捧红了首次担任导演的Curry Barker和主演Inde Navarrette。片中，这位女演员饰演一位年轻女子，在朋友许愿让她爱上自己后，她的行为变得古怪起来。

paragraphs.en: Navarrette charmed audiences with her wicked performance, but has also been building an audience outside of film. Fans quickly discovered that the actress once streamed games , such as Call of Duty, as well as single-player games like The Last of Us and Outlast, although it seems all videos have been pulled from the channel. A also popped up earlier this month, uploading her past streams. It's unclear if the channel is actually owned by her or if someone else is just capitalizing on her old content, but nevertheless, you can still check out some of her old streams on the channel.
paragraphs.cn: Navarrette以她邪魅的表演征服了观众，同时也在电影之外积累了一批粉丝。粉丝们很快发现，这位女演员曾直播过《使命召唤》等游戏，以及《最后生还者》和《逃生》等单人游戏，不过所有视频似乎都已被从频道中删除。本月早些时候，一个频道出现，上传了她过去的直播内容。目前尚不清楚该频道是否真的属于她，还是有人借她的旧内容牟利，但无论如何，你仍可以在该频道上看到一些她过去的直播。

paragraphs.en: Her partial playthrough of The Last of Us has racked up over 650,000 views in just three days, leading to a quippy response from PlayStation itself. "We're obsessed," said PlayStation UK's X account .
paragraphs.cn: 她《最后生还者》的部分游玩视频在短短三天内获得了超过65万次观看，引发了PlayStation官方的俏皮回应。PlayStation UK的X账号发文称：「我们着迷了。」

paragraphs.en: In a recent , Navarrette talked about how she grew up with video games and eventually started streaming during her downtime.
paragraphs.cn: 在最近的一次采访中，Navarrette谈到了她是如何伴随着电子游戏长大，并最终在闲暇时间开始直播的。

paragraphs.en: "It’s just something that I really love to do," she said. "One of my first games growing up that we would play, me and my older brother Amani, it’s the only thing we had to do at my Dad’s house. We started on the PS2, and we would play Shrek games in Big Head mode with my mom. And then I would branch off by myself to play campaign games. Me and Amani would play Call of Duty. He was really into Halo. Then we got into Red Dead and like, Fallout, like all of these games.
paragraphs.cn: 「这是我真正热爱的事情，」她说，「我小时候最早玩的游戏之一，是我和哥哥Amani一起玩的，那是我在爸爸家唯一能做的事。我们从PS2开始，和妈妈一起玩大头模式的《怪物史莱克》游戏。然后我会自己玩战役游戏。我和Amani会玩《使命召唤》。他非常喜欢《光环》。后来我们又玩了《荒野大镖客》和《辐射》之类的游戏。」

paragraphs.en: "I just would play or watch my older brother. And then I built my own PC during COVID and that was really fun to start to get into PC games. It really just took off with me loving watching YouTubers growing up, like Markiplier. So for me, it was like, oh, why not? If I'm not working on a show and I love playing video games by myself and I love playing with friends, then why not stream? It became a lot of fun."
paragraphs.cn: 「我常常自己玩或者看哥哥玩。后来在疫情期间我组装了自己的电脑，开始接触PC游戏，这真的很有趣。我从小就喜欢看Markiplier这样的YouTuber，所以对我来说，为什么不呢？如果我没有在拍戏，又喜欢自己玩游戏和和朋友一起玩，那为什么不直播呢？这变得非常有趣。」

paragraphs.en: It doesn't seem like Navarrette is active on Twitch these days, which isn't much of a surprise given that she is likely quite busy after the success of Obsession. The actress had previously played supporting roles in shows like 13 Reasons Why and Superman & Lois, but Obsession will likely take her to an all-new level. Whether she will have time to stream again remains to be seen, but at least there's a surplus of older content for fans to dig into.
paragraphs.cn: Navarrette最近似乎没有在Twitch上活跃，这并不令人意外，因为《Obsession》的成功后她很可能非常忙碌。这位女演员此前曾在《十三个原因》和《超人和露易丝》等剧中饰演配角，但《Obsession》可能会将她推向一个全新的高度。她是否还有时间再次直播尚待观察，但至少还有大量旧内容供粉丝们挖掘。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上关注他@Cade_Onder。
